score_descriptions.4: Strongest / most tech-oriented / highly interested / highly collaborative
score_descriptions.1: Low / disinterested / avoids tech or teamwork

labels.title: Tech Innovator / Creative Thinker
labels.description: You are a tech explorer. You are highly passionate about technology. You enjoy solving problems, experimenting, and collaborating. You thrive in creative, fast-paced projects.

labels.title: Problem Solver / Developer
labels.description: You love tackling challenges. You have strong analytical and tech skills. You work well independently or in teams and are suited for coding, IT, or data-focused roles.

labels.title: Supportive Technician / Analyst
labels.description: You’re reliable and helpful. You have moderate tech interest and prefer clear guidance. You are reliable in structured tasks and can grow your skills with experience.

labels.title: Explorer / Learner
labels.description: You’re curious but still learning. You are curious about technology but need more exposure. You may feel hesitant, but this is a good stage to explore and build confidence.
